original_txt:
Here are all the credit card signup bonus extensions during coronavirusIf you opened a new credit card with the hopes of earning a welcome bonus you may have trouble meeting the spending requirements amid layoffs and furloughs from the coronavirus pandemic

Thankfully many major card issuers are doubling the amount of time you have to earn the bonus depending on when you opened the card

Below CNBC Select rounds up which card issuers are currently offering welcome bonus extensions and the terms of the offers

This list is updated on a regular basis
corr_txt: here are all the credits card signup key extensions during coronavirusif you started a green black card with the intentions of collecting a welcomed bonus you may face missing following the waiting requirements following layoffs and furloughs from the coronavirus pandemicthankfully few key card issuers are doubling the length of time you want to claim the status depends on when you launched the cardbelow cnbc local reports up which card issuers are recently accepting discount status extensions and the lengths of the offersthis lists is adjusted on a constant basis
